form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when favourite; won by 2.25 len at this track 2yo Hcp January 31 over 1050m defeating Big Wigs carrying 59kg at $2.25. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Tough to beat on latest and can measure up again.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start in a small field at Morphettville Parks 2yo Sw+P on December 6 over 1000m, 2 len behind Moana Spirit with 55kg at $14. Returned from break ran last in a small field at Morphettville Parks 2yo C&G Bm68 on March 21 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind The Speed Machine carrying 56kg at $4.20. Will need to do a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6.5). Third race start. First start in a small field at Morphettville Parks 2yo Sw+P on December 6 over 1000m, 2 len behind Moana Spirit with 55kg at $14. Returned from break ran last in a small field at Morphettville Parks 2yo C&G Bm68 on March 21 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind The Speed Machine carrying 56kg at $4.20. Will need to do a bit more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out rounding the home turn and under pressure in the straight.
Slow to begin. Raced keenly and greenly throughout the event.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Third-up today. Resuming 6th of 10 at Murray Bridge Mm 2yo Classic on March 7 over 1100m, 5.5 len behind Rich On Bubbles carrying 57kg at $20. Second-up 2nd in a small field at Morphettville Parks 2yo C&G Bm68 on March 21 over 1000m, 3 len behind The Speed Machine with 56kg at $11. Not going well enough. Looks tested in this field.

form.formComment: Two-year-old colt making debut by Satono Aladdin out of Viva La Blues. Purchased for NZD $ 210,000 (NZB 2025 Karaka - Book 1). Won a jump-out at Cranbourne on March 23. Wide barrier to overcome. Profiles well and looks set for a strong run.

form.formComment: Gelding by Sandbar making his first appearance. Won trial at Morphettville Parks over 800m on April 2. Could pay to consider.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Sandbar making his first appearance. Won trial at Morphettville Parks over 800m on April 2. Could pay to consider.

form.formComment: Gelding by Spirit Of Boom facing the starter for the first time. Ran 3rd in a trial at Morphettville Parks over 1000m on April 2. Prefer to see under race conditions.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Spirit Of Boom facing the starter for the first time. Ran 3rd in a trial at Morphettville Parks over 1000m on April 2. Prefer to see under race conditions.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. At the latest run favourite; raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 1.0 len at this track LR Deq Stks March 28 over 1050m defeating Verzain carrying 56kg at $1.40. The start before that favourite; scored a big 4.5 len win at Morphettville Parks 2yo Bm62 March 14 over 1000m defeating Neveu carrying 59kg at $1.12. In form and certainly worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Chasing a hat-trick. At the latest run favourite; raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 1.0 len at this track LR Deq Stks March 28 over 1050m defeating Verzain carrying 56kg at $1.40. The start before that favourite; scored a big 4.5 len win at Morphettville Parks 2yo Bm62 March 14 over 1000m defeating Neveu carrying 59kg at $1.12. In form and certainly worth following up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inclined to shift about under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Second-up. Promising on debut 2nd of 7 at Murray Bridge 2yo Sw+P on January 17 over 1000m, nose behind Zouwin carrying 54.5kg at $8. Returned from break tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 2nd of 10 at this track in the LR Deq Stks on March 28 over 1050m, 1.0 len behind Never Ordinary with 56kg at $8. Going well and looks hard to beat again here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Second-up. Promising on debut 2nd of 7 at Murray Bridge 2yo Sw+P on January 17 over 1000m, nose behind Zouwin carrying 54.5kg at $8. form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Third race start today. When well in the market at debut, won by 1.3 len at Sale Mdn-Sw March 1 over 1112m in the wet defeating Piperine with 56kg at $3. Second-up raced on the pace before fading 10th of 12 at Caulfield Vobis Showdown on March 14 over 1200m, 8 len behind Big Wigs with 56kg at $9.50. Worth following up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Was at very long odds at debut, 4th of 10 at this track in the LR Deq Stks on March 28 over 1050m, 5 len behind Never Ordinary with 56kg at $61. Not keen on her chances this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. Was at very long odds at debut, 4th of 10 at this track in the LR Deq Stks on March 28 over 1050m, 5 len behind Never Ordinary with 56kg at $61. Not keen on her chances this time.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Third-up today. Resuming 5th of 11 at Ballarat 2yo Mdn-Sw on February 22 over 1100m, 7 len behind Medicinal with 56kg at $13. Last start sat on the pace when 3rd of 8 at Cranbourne 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1000m, slow going 1.5 len behind Sunbliss with 56kg at $4. Would have to improve further.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5). Dual acceptor. Third-up today. Resuming 5th of 11 at Ballarat 2yo Mdn-Sw on February 22 over 1100m, 7 len behind Medicinal with 56kg at $13. Last start sat on the pace when 3rd of 8 at Cranbourne 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1000m, slow going 1.5 len behind Sunbliss with 56kg at $4. Would have to improve further.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up when unable to obtain a clear run from the 500m until passing the 250m.

form.formComment: Two-year-old filly by leading sire Zoustar out of Miles Of Krishan who was bought for AUD $ 850,000 (Inglis 2025 Australian Easter Yearling Sale). Anthony & Sam Freedman has her primed for this with four recent trials prior to her debut today. Won her most recent trial at Sandown-Hillside over 800m on March 18. Don't rule her out.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start second last of 9 at Caulfield in the LR Debutant Stks on October 15 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Torture carrying 56kg at $9. Went for a spell before returning 6th of 8 at Flemington in the LR Festival on February 28 over 1000m, 7 len behind Gin Twist with 55kg at $5.50. Likely to find this out of reach.
